name: Repeated Failures → GitHub Issue

parameters.text:
=📋 GitHub issue auto-created: *{{ $json.title }}*
<{{ $json.html_url }}|View Issue> · Pipeline has failed {{ $('Format GitHub Issue').item.json.consecutive_failures || 3 }} times

notes: Triggered when Aeon reports 3 or more consecutive failures on the same pipeline. Automatically creates a GitHub issue with full context, root cause analysis, and a checklist. Notifies #ci-alerts in Slack with a link to the issue.
